note: Stage-1 control-tick timing decomposition + async correctness, native Linux host. FastDDS rmw_fastrtps_cpp intra-container. Policy=fine-tuned SmolVLA (outputs/train/smolvla_transfer_cube/checkpoints/020000, 20k steps on aloha_sim_transfer_cube_human), server --flow-steps 3 --precision fp32. Config: fps=50, g=0.5, ramp_in=5, 50 episodes seeds 0-49, ~15250 ticks.
host: native Linux, docker nvidia default runtime, GPU RTX A2000 Laptop 4GB

closed_loop.reference_original_gate: old host, matched dt (fps 6.62): ROS2 37/50=74% vs Python oracle 39/50=78% — 80% here is within the same binomial band, now at native 25 Hz

async_verdict: works as designed (SmolVLA Alg.1): idle~0 on every real tick; the 229ms fs3 PredictChunk latency is fully hidden behind queue execution (g=0.5 refetch at ~1s buffer).

grpc_step_bridge_to_sim_server.includes: mujoco env.step + EGL render + proto pack + gRPC serialize + docker net + GPU/CPU contention

predictchunk_rtt_client_to_policy_server.note: SmolVLA fs3 fp32 on RTX A2000; async worker thread; does not gate the tick

root_cause: Tick=40ms because ~28ms of real work (16ms gRPC sim Step + 11.6ms DDS 900KiB round trip + 0.06ms node) is rounded UP to 2x the fixed 20ms/50Hz bridge timer. DDS image transport is only ~12ms here (fast intra-host FastDDS), NOT the ~80ms the previous host recorded. The old 6.6Hz (151ms/tick: 70.5ms EGL render + ~80ms DDS) did not reproduce on native Linux with a real GPU.
levers: event-driven step instead of 50Hz wall timer -> ~28ms/35Hz
JPEG-encode the 900KiB frame -> trims the 12ms DDS leg
move policy-server contention off the render GPU -> gRPC Step 16ms->11ms
